plan_adjustments.detail: Baseline vitest is ALREADY GREEN (1662 pass / 30 skip / 0 fail; review baseline was 1660/2/30). Both review-time failures are load-dependent flakes, reproducible only under concurrent I/O: (a) buildDependencyGraph ENOENT = Windows delete-pending race on the reused .test-project dir (source mkdir already recursive:true); (b) the 'recursive-mode' failure is __tests__/scanner-export.test.ts:170 'should support recursive option' (scans live __dirname twice, count comparison races with concurrent scans) - NOT src/scanner/__tests__/ast-mode.test.ts as the plan cited (citation drift). P1-T10 re-scoped to: harden both flaky tests deterministically (unique temp dirs; fixture-based recursive comparison).
